bio.it: Sviluppatore full stack principalmente su Angular, Laravel e Django. Applicazioni web moderne con Docker, performance e codice mantenibile.
bio.en: Full stack developer mainly working with Angular, Laravel, and Django. Modern web apps with Docker, strong performance, and maintainable code.

description.it: Kit UI arcade anni '80: neon, CRT, audio synth e 80+ componenti CSS, senza dipendenze runtime.
description.en: 80s arcade UI kit: neon, CRT, synth audio, and 80+ CSS components with no runtime dependencies.

tagline.it: Componenti HUD, temi pronti e suoni synth per landing page, giochi web e demo retro.
tagline.en: HUD components, ready-made themes, and synth sounds for landing pages, web games, and retro demos.

body.it: Button, panel, card, tabs, modal, table, toast e utility per glitch, CRT e glow.
body.en: Buttons, panels, cards, tabs, modals, tables, toasts, plus glitch, CRT, and glow utilities.

body.it: AudioManager con effetti synth via Web Audio API, senza asset audio obbligatori.
body.en: AudioManager with synth effects via the Web Audio API, no required audio assets.

body.it: Usabile con HTML puro o con wrapper React e directive Angular standalone.
body.en: Works with plain HTML or React wrappers and standalone Angular directives.

body.it: Volevo un kit UI arcade completo ma leggero: facile da integrare, coerente visivamente e divertente da usare, senza framework obbligatori né bundle pesanti.
body.en: I wanted a complete yet lightweight arcade UI kit: easy to integrate, visually consistent, and fun to use, with no mandatory framework or heavy bundles.

description.it: Il monorepo di questo sito: libreria Angular condivisa, app portfolio, pannello admin, API Express e stack Docker.
description.en: The monorepo behind this site: shared Angular library, portfolio app, admin panel, Express API, and Docker stack.

tagline.it: Portfolio pubblico, backoffice admin e backend condiviso in un unico workspace.
tagline.en: Public portfolio, admin backoffice, and shared backend in one workspace.

body.it: Hero, griglia progetti, form contatti e client API esportati dal package dm-portfolio.
body.en: Hero, project grid, contact form, and API client exported from the dm-portfolio package.

body.it: Design token condivisi, tema chiaro/scuro, animazioni scroll reveal e contenuti in italiano e inglese.
body.en: Shared design tokens, light/dark theme, scroll reveal animations, and Italian and English content.

body.it: Form contatti con rate limit, login JWT, gestione messaggi, analytics visite e compose Docker per dev e produzione.
body.en: Contact form with rate limiting, JWT login, message management, visit analytics, and Docker compose for dev and production.

body.it: Il frontend pubblico e l'admin consumano la stessa API Express su Postgres. La libreria Angular incapsula componenti e servizi così portfolio e altri progetti possono condividere la stessa base UI.
body.en: The public frontend and admin both consume the same Express API on Postgres. The Angular library encapsulates components and services so the portfolio and other projects can share the same UI foundation.

it: Sviluppo e progetto applicazioni web end-to-end per clienti enterprise e pubblica amministrazione.
Sul frontend realizzo interfacce moderne e responsive con Angular, Bootstrap e Bootstrap Italia, traducendo i prototipi Figma in esperienze fluide, accessibili e performanti.

Sul backend lavoro con Laravel per la logica applicativa e la gestione dei database, e con Python (Flask e Django) per soluzioni server-side — anche con integrazioni di intelligenza artificiale per flussi conversazionali automatizzati.

Progetto architetture mantenibili e scalabili, uso Docker per ambienti di sviluppo e produzione coerenti, e collaboro con designer, project manager e sviluppatori senior per allineare requisiti funzionali e implementazione.
en: I design and build end-to-end web applications for enterprise and public sector clients.
On the frontend I deliver modern, responsive interfaces with Angular, Bootstrap and Bootstrap Italia, turning Figma prototypes into smooth, accessible and performant user experiences.

On the backend I work with Laravel for application logic and database management, and with Python (Flask and Django) for server-side solutions — including AI integrations for automated conversational flows.

I focus on maintainable, scalable architectures, use Docker for consistent development and production environments, and collaborate closely with designers, project managers and senior developers to align functional requirements with implementation.

it: Stage di sei mesi focalizzato sul consolidamento delle competenze full stack in contesto di consulenza IT.

Ho sviluppato componenti UI interattivi con Angular, gestendo lo stato dell'applicazione e ottimizzando le interfacce per esperienze fluide e reattive; sul backend ho progettato la logica con Laravel ed Eloquent ORM, implementando funzionalità per soluzioni robuste.
Ho completato un corso Laravel con certificazione Udemy, a conferma dell'impegno verso formazione continua e best practice di sviluppo.
en: A six-month internship focused on strengthening full-stack skills in an IT consulting environment.

I built interactive UI components with Angular, managing application state and optimising interfaces for fluid, responsive experiences; on the backend I designed logic with Laravel and Eloquent ORM, implementing features for robust solutions.
I also completed a certified Udemy Laravel course, reflecting my commitment to continuous learning and development best practices.
